description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named compiler-python-release that triggers on push and pull request events. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs for non-master and non-release branches. It consists of two jobs: build-compiler and build-native. The build-compiler job uses a matrix to build .NET 7.0 for multiple platforms (aarch64-macos, x86_64-linux, x86_64-windows) and uploads the build artifacts. The build-native job depends on build-compiler, installs the build artifacts, sets up .NET 7.0 and Python 3.10, and builds a wheel using cibuildwheel for each platform.
